mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS id, r.guest_id AS guestId, r.room_id AS roomId, rm.room_name AS roomName, r.check_in AS checkIn, r.check_out AS checkOut, r.guest_count AS guestCount, r.total_price AS totalPrice, r.status AS status, rm.picture AS picture, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reservations r JOIN rooms rm ON r.room_id = rm.id WHERE r.guest_id = #{guestId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
